title: QUANTA SERVICES TO HOST & WEBCAST ITS 2022 INVESTOR DAY
text: HOUSTON, March 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will host and webcast its 2022 Investor Day from New York City on Tues., Apr. 5, 2022.

title: Quanta Services Is Outperforming On Strong Renewable Demand. Room For Further Gains?
text: Quanta Services, a provider of infrastructure services for electric, oil, gas, and telecom companies has seen its stock gain almost 12% over the last month, compared to the S&P 500 which is up by about 1.5% over the same period. The stock also remains up by about 6% over the last week.
